channel.title: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn
channel.description:
Hi -
I've futzed a bit with the theme and now when I run `yarn dev` Webpack doesn't seem to watch for changes in the packages folder. A bit hard to debug because webpack is buried in frontity. Any ideas? Seen this before?

item.title: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
@mayer.georgep FYI → Frontity release: Yarn now works with Frontity

Read full topic
item.source: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn

item.title: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Yes, we are aware of the problem. Sorry about that. Yarn and npm are not consistent regarding local packages.

You can track the fix here: Support for yarn

Read full topic
item.source: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn

item.title: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Hi @mayer.georgep !

mayer.georgep:

Seems to be related to yarn vs. npm. re-rerunning npm install and npx frontity dev seems to fix it. Not really sure why though…

So, did re-running the npm install and npx frontity dev fix your problem or is it still persisting?

Read full topic
item.source: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn

item.title: Webpack not watching packages folder after yarn
item.dc:creator: mayer.georgep
item.description:
Seems to be related to yarn vs. npm. re-rerunning npm install and npx frontity dev seems to fix it. Not really sure why though…

Read full topic
